---
title: "Dad Book Club"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Get Dad Book Club posts in your email

<form
  action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/jknapp"
  method="post"
  class="embeddable-buttondown-form"
>
  <label for="bd-email">Enter your email</label>
  <input type="email" name="email" id="bd-email" />
  <input type="submit" value="Subscribe" />
  <p>
    <a href="https://buttondown.com/refer/jknapp" target="_blank">
      Powered by Buttondown.
    </a>
  </p>
</form>
